data.title: Top 3 Consumer Stocks That Are Set To Fly This Quarter
Donald Trump Says 'Market Is Going To Boom,' Claiming '$6-7 Trillion' Worth Of Inflows Will Come After The Worst Selloff Since 2020
data.description: President Donald Trump said, "The market is going to boom, " dismissing the concerns before boarding Air Force One for his Miami visit.

data.title: Ross Gerber And Gary Kasparov Slam Bill Ackman's Defense Of Trump's Trade War Tactics: 'This Is Garbage Policy'
data.description: Ross Gerber, the president and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management and chess champion, Gary Kasparov, have publicly criticized Bill Ackman for his defense of President Trump's trade war strategies.

data.title: Hershey Bites Into Better-For-You Snacking With LesserEvil Deal: Details
data.description: Hershey deepens its better-for-you snack strategy with a deal to acquire LesserEvil, known for organic popcorn and bold flavors. The acquisition enhances Hershey's growing savory snack lineup.

data.title: Iran-Backed Houthi Group Faces Sanctions On Cryptocurrency Wallets Funding War Efforts
data.description: The Treasury Department took action against a Houthi financial network, imposing sanctions on cryptocurrency wallets.
